description: Loading screen with plane animation between Maroochydore and London.
frame_description: A red and white loading screen for WebJet showing a flight path from Maroochydore to London.
The search results page for flights from Maroochydore to London is displayed.

description: User scrolls down the results list.
frame_description: The user is scrolling down the page to view more flight options.

description: User clicks 'View Details' on the first flight result.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'View Details' button of the first flight result.
The flight details section for the first result expands to show more information.
User continues scrolling down the list of flight results.
The cursor lingers over the 'View Details' button of the second flight result.

description: User clicks 'View Details' on the second flight result.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'View Details' button for the second flight option.
The details for the second flight result are now visible.
User scrolls further down the page.

description: User clicks 'View Details' on the third flight result.
frame_description: User clicks to see details for the third flight result.
The third flight's details are expanded.
User scrolls down the results page.
Cursor is positioned over the 'View Details' button of the fourth result.
